user_message: Can you work with me on account health for Blue Yonder Airlines?

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-10 10:25 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

Just checking in on the account health proposal. Our CIO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 13:58 EST
Subject: Re: account health Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Blue Yonder Airlines: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-C trap (Re-qualification questions presumptuous); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-C failure mode (Re-qualification questions presumptuous)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-C -- Re-qualification questions presumptuous
